title: Indian national diagnostic chain — data monetization strategic
description: National-scale Indian chain (SRL / Metropolis / Dr Lal tier: 1.8M slides/yr, 85 pathologist FTE, 120 sites, 1800 runs/week, 18 scanners, 85TB curated dataset). Exercises all diagnostic-lab pillars plus chain-only data_monetization. The data_monetization pillar should be flagged low-confidence by Claude (strategic optionality, not base case) per index.html:2793.

comparative.dpa_coverage: missing — data monetization is the single red-category emerging line item in DPA
